# Bart Pullen

> Personal portfolio for Bart Pullen, focused on information security, practical web development, and quantitative research.

Site: https://www.bartpullen.nl
Language: nl-NL
Primary profile: [Bart Pullen on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bartpullen/)

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.bartpullen.nl/): Overview of Bart Pullen's work across security, web development, and data analysis.
- [Security](https://www.bartpullen.nl/security): Security Officer and compliance work, including ISO 27001 and Cyber Resilience Act themes.
- [ISO 27001](https://www.bartpullen.nl/security/iso27001): Practical ISO 27001:2022 implementation approach for ISMS, risk management, governance, and continuous improvement.
- [Cyber Resilience Act](https://www.bartpullen.nl/security/cra): Cyber Resilience Act impact analysis for digital products, including SBOM, vulnerability handling, reporting, and compliance planning.
- [Web](https://www.bartpullen.nl/web): Web design and development work focused on fast, clean, maintainable sites.
- [Labs](https://www.bartpullen.nl/labs): Research area for trading studies, models, and interactive data experiments.
- [SPX Options Backtest](https://www.bartpullen.nl/labs/spx): SPX options backtest study covering DTE optimization, win rates, and trade management.
- [Squeeze Spreads](https://www.bartpullen.nl/labs/squeeze): Systematic swing trading framework based on TTM Squeeze, EMA stacks, and option credit spreads.
- [Turtle Soup Simulator](https://www.bartpullen.nl/labs/turtlesoup): Interactive ICT Turtle Soup strategy simulator for liquidity sweeps and market structure shifts.
- [ICT Concepts](https://www.bartpullen.nl/labs/ict): Guide to ICT trading concepts, liquidity pools, order blocks, fair value gaps, and institutional orderflow.

## Suggested Citation

Bart Pullen is a Security Officer and web developer who publishes practical work on information security, compliance, web development, and quantitative trading research.
